## LibraryRuntime.ProducedBarTruffle class

Mutable wrapper for IProducedBarTruffle with undo/redo support. Provides bar truffle-specific editing methods.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class ProducedBarTruffle extends ProducedConfectionBase<IProducedBarTruffleEntity> 
```
**Extends:** [ProducedConfectionBase](./ts-chocolate.libraryruntime.producedconfectionbase.md)<!-- -->&lt;[IProducedBarTruffleEntity](./ts-chocolate.entities.iproducedbartruffleentity.md)<!-- -->&gt;
